title: SAFEMA Tribunal: Online Forex Trading Through Overseas Portal Violates FEMA; Penalty Reduced Considering Losses
description:
SAFEMA Tribunal held overseas online forex trading violated FEMA despite claims of ignorance, but reduced the penalty from ₹5.20 crore to ₹20 lakh after noting the trader suffered losses of ₹3.25 crore.
The post SAFEMA Tribunal: Online Forex Trading Through Overseas Portal Violates FEMA; Penalty Reduced Considering Losses appeared first on TaxGuru.
